name: HighGold Mining Inc.
description: HighGold Mining Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on high-grade gold projects in North America. The company's flagship asset is the high-grade Johnson Tract Gold-Zinc-Copper Project located in Southcentral Alaska, USA. HighGold also controls a portfolio of active gold exploration projects in the Timmins gold camp of Ontario, Canada, including the Munro-Croesus Gold Project. The company is committed to creating shareholder value through discovery and responsible development of high-grade mineral deposits.
